## User-facing behavior

## Safety checklist

- [ ] Does not claim HPA controller internals that are not exposed by the API
- [ ] `--suggest` / `--fix` changes remain dry-run-first
- [ ] Adds or updates focused tests for new behavior
- [ ] Mentions remaining ambiguity where Kubernetes status is insufficient
